patch_type: Decision record hardening over V56.1 evidence register and V56 model registry
release_chain_status: V56.2 is the current implemented build. It loads after V56.1 in src/ui/v52-7-operational-layer.js. It adds decision records into Runtime, Evidence, and Proof Pack while preserving model explanations, evidence register, registry-rendered TrustMap, thick neon-blue CyberShield Core shield boundary, Purpose Protocol, and no-new-top-level-tabs rule. GitHub Pages browser QA is required after deploy.
top_level_tab_rule: Do not add more top-level tabs. Upgrade existing workspaces only.
version_label_rule: Build and version labels belong in Settings/admin metadata and repo documentation only. They must not appear as executive-facing dashboard content.
public_naming_rule: Public product name is CyberShield Executive OS. Current prototype build is V56.2. Do not call the public build CyberShield OS v8 unless the repo, README, loader, Settings/admin metadata, and public UX intentionally move to that version scheme.
controlling_doctrine: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
v56_2_changes: adds decision records into Runtime, Evidence, and Proof Pack
adds text download for demo decision records
preserves V56.1 Evidence and Assumption Register

decision_record_hardening.boundary: Static advisory records only. No live approvals, ticketing, enforcement, evidence retrieval, banking verification, or compliance validation.

trust_model_registry.boundary: Demo-directional advisory models only. No certification, live evidence retrieval, legal determination, or production-calibrated scoring.

trustmap_interaction_layer.boundary: Static advisory navigation only. Does not create tickets, retrieve evidence, send notifications, or trigger live workflows.

internet_trust_engine_future_track.sequence_note: Do not implement before Trust Scoring Models, score object contract, model traces, evidence register, decision records, and Proof Pack defensibility are stable.

recommended_next_build.label: V56.3 Universal Score Object and Score Band Contract
goals: support future MVP Trust Scoring Models

implemented_release_train.v52: Model Registry Foundation and Human-First Executive Control View
implemented_release_train.v52.1: TrustMap Visual Restoration and Layer Patch
implemented_release_train.v52.2: Guided Onboarding, Routed Dashboard, and Layered TrustMap Patch
implemented_release_train.v52.4: TrustMap Core Logo and Control Plane Anchor Patch
implemented_release_train.v52.7: TrustMap Navigation and Report Output System
implemented_release_train.v53: Trust Model and Deep Scenario Spine Build
implemented_release_train.v55.2: TrustMap Core Boundary and Constellation Polish
implemented_release_train.v55.3: TrustMap Registry and Visual Object Stabilization
implemented_release_train.v55.5: TrustMap CSS and Visual Object Cleanup
implemented_release_train.v56: Trust Model Registry and Score Explanation Layer

prototype_boundary: The current GitHub Pages build is a lightweight static advisory prototype. It is not connected to live enterprise telemetry, SIEM, EDR, IAM, Microsoft 365, cloud control planes, GRC tooling, production agent enforcement, Google Sheets, CRM sync, ticketing, notifications, marketplace systems, ad platforms, domain-intelligence systems, identity verification systems, CMMC certification systems, healthcare compliance validation systems, banking/payment systems, live evidence retrieval, internet claim verification, or takedown automation.
known_limitations: Decision records use static prototype data
Decision record downloads are text files, not branded PDFs
Decision records do not create tickets, send approvals, retrieve evidence, or trigger live workflow
Evidence states do not retrieve or validate live evidence
Model explanations are demo-directional and not statistically validated
Internet Trust Engine is documented as a future requirement track but is not yet implemented
GitHub Pages browser QA required after deploy
